content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:13 and its neighbor atoms. Let me analyze the connections:

Atom C:13 (carbon) is connected to:
- Atom C:12 (carbon) - visible as a direct bond
- Atom H:21 (hydrogen) - visible as a direct bond
- Atom O:14 (oxygen) - visible as a direct bond

The molecule appears to be in geometry configuration 6147, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_6147.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 13 (C) are:
- Atom index 12 (C)
- Atom index 21 (H)
- Atom index 14 (O)

Geomconf_index: 6147

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 13, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
